dod_description_only_flags.semantics: description-flagged contract awards absent from the SR3/ST3 code list; not adjudicated miscoding

nasa_description_only_flags.semantics: description-flagged contract awards absent from the SR3/ST3 code list; not adjudicated miscoding

dark_independence_scenario.assumption: two-list homogeneous independent capture (list odds ratio = 1)

dark_frame_size.semantics: preliminary sampled frame-size estimate; not a dark Phase III count

retrieval_auc.semantics: portfolio/linkage proxy, not dark-Phase-III detector performance

survival.semantics: not a lower bound; corrected estimand is first observed Phase II to first later observed coded Phase III action

dark_structure_stratified_models.semantics: standalone AB-Chapman + task-order ABC log-linear, dark cells summed; model scenarios, NOT bounds; list-C precision unadjudicated

gsa_awarded_described_phase3.coded_10q: 0 of 189 (research=None, full census via award details)
gsa_awarded_described_phase3.semantics: described 'SBIR PHASE III', awarding=GSA FY16-25; text-flagged, unadjudicated; awarding-scope gap

self_declared_phase3_vehicles_dod.semantics: IDV award types with description 'SBIR PHASE III', awarding=DoD; vehicle-level capture list
